query: SELECT id, title, createdAt, folderId FROM conversations WHERE title LIKE '%tag%' OR title LIKE '%test%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3e3CFiJAzVVBdhv.root --database gERCUFGQw3Z2D55fZfBbym --execute SELECT id, title, createdAt, folderId FROM conversations WHERE title LIKE '%tag%' OR title LIKE '%test%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC
